customValue.fullName: Referral resulted from outbound/proactive engagement with client, or from a support case where TriMech products/services were discussed.
customValue.label: Referral resulted from outbound/proactive engagement with client, or from a support case where TriMech products/services were discussed.

customValue.fullName: Referral resulted from inbound inquiry where the client called or emailed asking for a quote or to be referred to sales rep.
customValue.label: Referral resulted from inbound inquiry where the client called or emailed asking for a quote or to be referred to sales rep.

GlobalValueSet.description: Used for tracking the source for Employee Referrals
